name: add_note
description: Adds a freeform note to a CRM entity (contact, deal, or company). Notes are timestamped and attributed to the calling user. Supports privacy controls and tagging for organized retrieval.

entity_type.description: The type of CRM entity to attach the note to.
entity_type.$comment: Enum ensures the backend routes the note to the correct entity store without ambiguity.

entity_id.description: The unique identifier of the target entity (contact, deal, or company) to attach the note to.
entity_id.$comment: Validated server-side against the specified entity_type to prevent cross-entity ID collisions.

note.description: The full text content of the note to add.
examples: Customer confirmed budget is approved. Next step: send formal proposal.
Spoke to CEO — they are evaluating three vendors. Decision by end of Q4.
Company recently acquired StartupX; may expand their usage significantly.
note.$comment: Max 10,000 characters to prevent oversized payloads while supporting detailed sales notes.

is_private.description: If true, the note is only visible to the creator and CRM administrators; hidden from other team members.
is_private.$comment: Private notes support sensitive observations that shouldn't appear in team-wide activity feeds.

tags.description: Optional list of tag strings to categorize the note for search and filtering.
tags.$comment: Note-level tags are independent of entity-level tags; used for activity stream filtering.
